evidence: This is a MUST HAVE for any SciFi fan.
The plot is not easy to figure out and that makes for a good show to me.
The plot is thickening and the suspense is just at the right amount.
Captivated by the very first show and the ending of this season just leaves you hungry to find out more.
The actors play their parts with excitement and makes the movie intriguing at every turn!
Quality entertainment without dealing with obscene gestures.
I have watched this movie over and over.
Loved the ending of this chapter!

summary: The user has a strong preference for fantasy and sci-fi genres, enjoying complex narratives with fast pacing. They value high production quality and emotional engagement, often finding themselves captivated by the stories and characters.
